---
title: "Robotic Systems Laboratory"
subtitle: "Project website starter"
---

## Overview

This site is a clean template adapted from `course-website`.

Add your own:

- notes in `notes/`
- slides in `slides/`
- code and assets in `code/`

## Getting Started

- Edit this homepage in `index.qmd`
- Update site settings in `_quarto.yml`
- Run `quarto preview` to iterate locally
